semantic.role: Unit test suite for the structural and semantic footprint calculation utilities in the ArchSpine infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Verify that calculateStructuralFootprint produces consistent output despite reordering of import/export entries within the same module.
Verify that calculateSemanticFootprint produces different output when module dependency signatures change (e.g., a dependency export type changes).
Act as a regression guard against accidental behaviour change in the footprint module.
outOfScope: Integration or end-to-end testing of the footprint module with real files.
Performance or stress testing of footprint calculations.
Any other utility or service modules beyond the footprint functions.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (enforced by rule test-file-suffix). This file satisfies that invariant.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated regression coverage for the footprint utility, ensuring that reordering noise and semantic changes are correctly detected by the footprint functions.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Commit e9cba38 appears to have updated or added tests for footprint stability – the exact intent is unclear, but the tests themselves verify ordering and semantic invariance.
